g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in tools.yaml and goal.md for grubbot?')
sendPrompt('How does grubbot generate training data?')
g.text: Gemini Flash / Groq / local 70B via ollama

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does grubbot finetune the local model?')
g.text: Unsloth + TRL · runs on your GPU

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does grubbot evaluate the finetuned model?')
g.text: Runs test cases · scores per tool

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does grubbot output when done?')

svg.text: generates targeted data → back to stage 2
